nasb.text: But the days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast in that day.

esv.text: The days will come when the bridegroom is taken away from them, and then they will fast in that day.

cnv.text: 但日子到了，新郎要被取去，離開他們，那一天他們就要禁食了。

ccb.text: 但有一天新郎将被带走，那时他们就要禁食了。

csbs.text: 可是日子将要来到：当新郎从他们中间被带走的时候，他们那时——在那一天就要禁食了。
